headline: Jim Cramer on Regeneron: “There Could Be Some More Downgrades”
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed while explaining how investors can navigate the current market rotation. Cramer highlighted the company’s unsuccessful trial, as he remarked: Finally, there’s Regeneron, which got blasted by a poor result on a metastatic melanoma cancer trial. I, along with many others, thought that this trial […]

headline: Apogee Therapeutics: Targeting Atopic Dermatitis
summary: Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. is rated a Hold, driven by promising data for the lead asset zumilokibart in atopic dermatitis. Read more on APGE stock here.
